title: Token 为中心的连续批处理: schedule() 调度器

execution.reason: 纯单元测试，不 import vllm / 无 CUDA 依赖 —— 按 tester 契约在 host 跑

lint_fidelity.result: 保真度检查全部通过（无 BLOCKING）

tests.name: test_first_schedule_emits_new_request_data
tests.behavior: 首次调度 WAITING→NewRequestData(全量)，token_budget 递减，入 running 置 RUNNING

tests.name: test_second_schedule_emits_cached_request_data
tests.behavior: 第二拍同请求转 CachedRequestData(增量)，追赶公式 11-10=1

tests.name: test_continuous_batch_mixes_prefill_and_decode
tests.behavior: 不分 prefill/decode 相：同拍 a(decode 1)+b(prefill 20) 共享 token 预算=21

tests.name: test_token_budget_chunks_long_prefill
tests.behavior: chunked prefill 把 50-prompt 截到预算 16，乐观推进 num_computed_tokens

tests.name: test_no_chunked_prefill_breaks_when_over_budget
tests.behavior: chunked 关闭则超预算整块不调度

tests.name: test_preemption_when_out_of_blocks
tests.behavior: KV 块耗尽→FCFS 抢占队尾→被抢者回 waiting、num_computed_tokens=0

tests.name: test_no_waiting_scheduled_after_preemption
tests.behavior: `if not preempted_reqs` 守卫：抢占拍不调度 WAITING

tests.name: test_async_scheduler_adds_placeholder_after_schedule
tests.behavior: AsyncScheduler 调度后 +1 占位，下一拍仍能预调度 decode 槽，占位累加到 2

tests.name: test_async_placeholder_redeemed_on_output
tests.behavior: 真 token 回流时占位 -len 兑现，配平到 0

fidelity_cross_check.note: 对照 pin f3fef123 真实源码确认行为对齐（非仅自洽）
verified: RUNNING 追赶公式 num_tokens_with_spec + num_output_placeholders - num_computed_tokens 及三重 min（long_prefill_token_threshold / token_budget / max_model_len-1）== vllm/v1/core/sched/scheduler.py L408-L421
WAITING 守卫 `if not preempted_reqs and self._pause_state == PauseState.UNPAUSED` == scheduler.py L568
AsyncScheduler._update_after_schedule 占位 += 1 + cur_num_spec_tokens 与 _update_request_with_output 占位 -= len(new_token_ids) == vllm/v1/core/sched/async_scheduler.py

recovered: f6 (async_scheduling 实例如何驱动连续批处理)
f10 (schedule() 每拍推哪些请求/多少 token)
